title: DisplayName
description: Player-supplied display name. NFC-normalized at ingest, capped at 24 characters, and restricted to a closed character allow-list (Unicode letter, digit, separator, plus a small punctuation set). Cross-link: `docs/architecture/display-name-policy.md`, `docs/architecture/untrusted-strings.md`. The local profile field is `state.profile.displayName`; the multiplayer `signaling-payload-policy.md` separately bans transmission over the signaling channel — this schema validates the local field shape.
